name: Booth Net Cafe & Capsule
description: Internet cafe and capsule hotel near the Godzilla head landmark. Capsule stay approx ¥3,000/night (¥3,700 Sat); net-cafe seating from ¥600/2hr. Shower access is a paid add-on, not included by default.
gray_zone_note: Internet cafe overnight stays are not licensed lodging under the same category as hotels (Ryokan Business Act) -- treat as gray-zone-adjacent for legal/safety framing even though the business itself is legitimate.

name: Shinjuku Kuyakusho-mae Capsule Hotel
description: Named, reviewed capsule hotel in Kabukicho, adjacent to the ward office (kuyakusho).

name: Maruhan Pachinko Parlor (orientation landmark, not lodging)
description: Included only as a gray-zone orientation landmark, not an actual lodging option. Legally tolerated three-entity prize-exchange structure keeps pachinko outside gambling law, but it is not licensed lodging or a rest facility.
gray_zone_note: Landmark reference only. Not a lodging or rest facility. Gambling is regulated under Japanese law.
